description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a combination of stone and glass exterior walls, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows and a flat roof. The property includes a gated driveway with multiple parked vehicles, a landscaped front yard, and a prominent entryway with steps leading to the main door. The house has a separate garage structure with a rooftop terrace, accessible by an external staircase. There is a wooden deck area at the rear, likely for outdoor relaxation, and several outdoor lighting fixtures are visible around the property. The windows are arranged in both vertical strips and large panels, giving the house a contemporary and open feel. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern two-story house with stone and glass walls, large windows, a flat roof, and a gated driveway with multiple vehicles. Features include a rooftop terrace, wooden deck, and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, gated driveway, three vehicles, and the prominent glass-walled garage with rooftop terrace.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass garage, rooftop terrace, and the length of the driveway with parked vehicles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, external staircase to the terrace, and the back facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear deck, vertical window strips, and the arrangement of vehicles along the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, a large glass door, and minimalistic landscaping; no porch or columns, emphasizing clean lines.
